title: Deadline link more then one status
excerpt:
Hi, 
Someone know if there is a way to connect Date columns (set as deadline) with multiple statusses? Instead of only one. Sometimes u only want the deadline to be checked if all statusses are complete…

posts.author: Mostra (Joris van Wersch)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

Someone know if there is a way to connect Date columns (set as deadline) with multiple statusses? Instead of only one. Sometimes u only want the deadline to be checked if all statusses are complete…

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Mostra ,
You can do this by creating multiple Date columns and having a corresponding Status column for each deadline. For instance:1) Deadline 1 with Status 1, 2) Deadline 2 with Status 2 and then you can create a automation that will update the Deadline columns based on the appropriate status conditions.
For example,when both the Status 1 and Status 2 are completed, the corresponding Deadline 1 and Deadline 2 would be populated with the respective deadline dates.

Hope its helpful.
